safeguard your crypto journey
Excellent
technology
safeguard your crypto journey
Code open source
The code is completely open source and equipped with an open API interface to provide services for third-party applications or developers, realize the sharing of data and functions, promote collaborative business operations, and promote the vigorous development of the BCH ecosystem.
Asset Security
While the wallet code is open source, key data is stored locally. Encrypted and multi-layered protection ensures the safety of your crypto assets.
Data Security
SWAPCASH provides on-chain monitoring of order data, order status detection, and data retrieval to ensure the transparency and security of transactions.
